Variables.Name: SubTracks
Variables.Description: A list of subtracks that belong to this track

Variables.Name: ActiveCondition
Variables.Description: Sets the condition that must be met for this track to be enabled

Variables.Name: bOnePerGroup
Variables.Description: Whether there may only be one of this track in an UInterpGroup.

Variables.Name: bDirGroupOnly
Variables.Description: If this track can only exist inside the Director group.

Variables.Name: bDisableTrack
Variables.Description: Whether or not this track should actually update the target actor.

Variables.Name: bIsSelected
Variables.Description: Whether or not this track is selected in the editor.

Variables.Name: bIsAnimControlTrack
Variables.Description: If true, the  AActor  this track is working on will have BeginAnimControlFinishAnimControl called on it.

Variables.Name: bSubTrackOnly
Variables.Description: If this track can only exist as a sub track.

Variables.Name: bVisible
Variables.Description: Whether or not this track is visible in the editor.

Variables.Name: bIsRecording
Variables.Description: Whether or not this track is recording in the editor.

Variables.Name: SubTrackGroups
Variables.Description: A list of subtrack groups (for editor UI organization only)

Variables.Name: SupportedSubTracks
Variables.Description: A list of supported tracks that can be a subtrack of this track.

Variables.Name: bIsCollapsed
Variables.Description: If this track is collapsed. (Only applies  to tracks with subtracks).
